title: Guild Bounty Board
description: The Guild always has work for capable adventurers. Check the bounty board for available contracts - monster extermination, bandit clearing, escort jobs. Rewards scale with difficulty. Simple work for a Champion, but the gold is steady.

objectives.description: Return to the Guild for payment

notes: REPEATABLE. Available after Champion rank. Bounty targets rotate weekly. Includes: bandit leaders, monster dens, escort missions, dungeon clearing. Rewards scale with target difficulty. Can complete unlimited times. Works with BountyManager system.
